notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the grub2 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 13 CVEs: CVE-2023-4001, CVE-2023-4692, CVE-2023-4693, CVE-2024-45774, CVE-2024-45775, and 8 more.
